title: phyllanthus koghiensis
intro: Phyllanthus koghiensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is a type of shrub or small tree native to New Caledonia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to protect against liver damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus koghiensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Phyllanthus koghiensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
